'''Clak'dor I''' was originally the innermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colu system]] of the [[Mayagil sector/Legends|Mayagil sector]] until it was consumed by [[Colu/Legends|Colu]] around [[8000 BBY]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
